economy.title: Economy
economy.description: Complete virtual currency system, bank, daily jobs and customizable shop. Your members will love competing in the rankings.

rpg.title: RPG

moderation.title: Moderation
moderation.description: Advanced anti-raid, smart anti-spam, automatic logs and configurable automod. Protect your server with ease.

Footer.description: The ultimate bot for Discord communities. Economy, RPG and Moderation in one place.

VIP.title: Elevate your experience
VIP.subtitle: Unlock exclusive powers and show your status in the community with VIP plans.
VIP.faqSubtitle: Get your questions answered about VIP plans.

faq.q1: How do I activate my VIP?
faq.a1: After purchase, run /vip redeem in any server. Your plan will be activated automatically within 5 minutes.
faq.q2: Is VIP per server or per account?
faq.a2: VIP is linked to your Discord account and applies to all servers where the bot is present.
faq.q3: Can I cancel at any time?
faq.a3: Yes! You can cancel your subscription at any time. The plan remains active until the end of the paid period.
faq.a4: VIP benefits are active while your subscription is valid. Purchased cosmetic items remain permanently.

vip.name: VIP
vip.description: For those who want to stand out in the community.
